request_payload.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I worry about our allies not pulling their weight. Did you know that only 3 of our NATO partners meet the 2% defense spending target? We can't afford to be the world's policeman while others freeload. Our tax dollars should secure OUR borders first. #NationalSecurity
